title: shorea laevifolia
intro: Shorea laevifolia, also known as the smooth-barked shorea, is a species of tree in the family Dipterocarpaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Shorea laevifolia include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and providing antioxidant protection against cell damage. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or extracts, and are often used to treat various health conditions, including fever, cough, and digestive issues.
